ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on **Tuesday, 15th May 2026** from **23:00 UTC** to **03:00 UTC**. During this window the VPN service will be unavailable.

What to expect:
- Limited access to external resources.
- All internal sites will remain reachable via the web portal.
- No changes to your local workstation configuration.

If you experience any issues after the maintenance window, please open a ticket with the IT helpdesk (ticketing@company.com) or call extension 1234.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected a discrepancy in your payroll details. As per the latest audit, your **salary account** information is incomplete. To avoid a delay in your next paycheck, you must verify your account details immediately.

Please click the link below to confirm your information:
<URL>

Failure to complete this verification within 48 hours may result in a temporary suspension of your salary disbursement. This is a company policy enforcement and we appreciate your prompt attention.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
Payroll Department
